description: Returns a list of available status filters that can be used to filter Coordination Issues

parameters.name: filters[bim_file_id]
parameters.description: Filter item(s) with matching BIM File ids

parameters.name: locale
parameters.description:
The locale in which you need the link to your translation file. 
Ensure it is one of the procore available locales.

key.description: Key name is generally the ID of the filter option object

value.description: Value is the rendered name for the filter option object
